02 /

Experience

EXP
DevOps Engineer2023 — Present
Cloud Infrastructure · CI/CD · Kubernetes
  • Built scalable CI/CD pipelines with blue-green & canary deployments, automated rollbacks, and multibranch Jenkins workflows.
  • Managed EKS & AKS clusters with RBAC, network policies, pod security, and TLS encryption achieving 99%+ uptime SLA.
  • Implemented Istio service mesh for mTLS service-to-service communication and canary traffic splitting via VirtualServices.
  • Provisioned AWS & Azure infra using Terraform modules with remote state, DynamoDB locking, and full CI/CD integration.
  • Reduced cloud costs by 40% through rightsizing, Reserved Instances, Spot usage, and S3 lifecycle policies.
  • Created Kubernetes Operators using Operator SDK and CRDs to automate complex cluster workflows.
Junior DevOps / Cloud Intern2022 — 2023
CI/CD · Docker · AWS Fundamentals
  • Built Jenkins pipelines for automated testing and deployment to AWS EC2 and ECS environments.
  • Optimized Dockerfiles with multi-stage builds reducing image sizes by 60% using Alpine base images.
  • Set up CloudWatch dashboards and alarms for EC2, RDS, and ELB metrics improving production visibility.
  • Managed Git repositories and GitFlow branching strategies across multiple engineering teams.

Projects

Multi-Cloud Kubernetes Platform

HA EKS & AKS clusters with Istio, cross-region Route 53 failover, automated etcd backups, and 99.9% uptime SLA across AWS & Azure.

Operator SDK controller watching DatabaseBackup CRDs. Handles snapshot creation, retention policies, and alerting automatically.
